title: . Distribution of homework. For purposes of this Chapter, the "employer" of homeworkers includes
content:
. Distribution of homework. For purposes of this Chapter, the "employer" of homeworkers includes 
any person, natural or artificial who, for his account or benefit, or on behalf of any person residing outside the 
country, directly or indirectly, or through an employee, agent contractor, sub-contractor or any other person: 
1. Delivers, or causes to be delivered, any goods, articles or materials to be processed or fabricated in 
or about a home and thereafter to be returned or to be disposed of or distributed in accordance 
with his directions; or 
   
2. Sells any goods, articles or materials to be processed or fabricated in or about a home and then 
rebuys them after such processing or fabrication, either by himself or through some other person. 
 
BOOK FOUR 
HEALTH, SAFETY AND SOCIAL WELFARE BENEFITS 
 
Title I 
MEDICAL, DENTAL AND OCCUPATIONAL SAFETY 
 
Chapter I 
MEDICAL AND DENTAL SERVICES
